---
title: max-public-structs
description: "Limit exported structs per file."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Limit exported structs per file. Strider default: maximum 5.

## Bad

```go
// More than five exported struct types in one file.
```

## Good

```go
type Request struct{}
type Response struct{}
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only max-public-structs`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
